name: Pumpkin-Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Brown Sugar; Firmly Packed (packed firmly)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine the brown sugar, cornstarch, cinnamon, and salt. Stir in the water and butter.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Carefully add the apple slices and cook for another 4 minutes. Remove from the heat and set aside.
4. In a bowl, combine the egg, granulated sugar, pumpkin puree, evaporated milk, remaining salt, cinnamon, clove, and ginger.
5. Beat until well blended using a rotary or electric mixer on low speed.
6. Pour the apple mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
7. Spoon an even layer of the pumpkin mixture over the apple mixture.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F for 10 minutes. Reduce the temperature to 375°F and bake another 40 minutes or until the filling is set around the edge.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
